lore.english:
Asagi's younger sister. Always bright and friendly. A young girl who gives off both a gorgeous and cheerful vibe.

Born with a rare ninja art just like her sister, she is a ninja who uses "Shadow Art". She became a Taimanin much to her sister's objection, because she also wanted to fight for justice like her sister Asagi.

Sakura has helped her sister in multiple missions, and even if she isn't noticed that well, she has made a name for herself as an exemplary Taimanin.

She uses [FFFF00FF]Shadow Art[-], a supernatural ninja art. It gives the use the ability to meld into shadow, or teleport between shadows. She is also capable of shaping shadows into animals like sharks or bears, or using the shadow itself as a bladed weapon. She uses dual-wielding ninja daggers as her main weapon.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shadow Arts: Shadow Ambush[-]
skills.description:
Moves through shadows to slash the enemy and returns.
When in [&Stealth], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:50102]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack,[&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:50103]%)[-].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shadow Arts: Beast Call[-]
skills.description:
Summons a shadow creature and sends it toward the enemy.
Inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:50201]%)[-] [&DefDown] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:50201]%[-] chance if the target is a [&Color_GreenYellow]Defense Type[-].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:50201] turn(s)
Goes into [&Stealth] mode when defeating an enemy with this skill.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:50203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Shadow Arts: Hundred Ghost March[-]
skills.description:
Summons multiple shadows and sends them charging at [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
If targets hit by the shadows have 3 active [&Buff]s or more, steals 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff].
